frames.setting: Minimalist white studio space with a wooden mid-century modern dining table, wooden chairs, and a jute rug; bright, even white background suggesting a photography or video studio setup
visual_elements: Small potted plant and glass on table
Candidate in dark suit and tie bending toward a seated woman and young child
Woman in grey top and young child in blue outfit
Repeated frames showing the same moment from same angle (sequential stills)
frames.presentation_style: Scripted or staged scenario in a clean studio environment; no text overlays; focused on interpersonal interaction between candidate and family; very controlled visual setting

frames.setting: Same white studio with wooden table and chairs; action progresses to handshakes and the child interacting more freely with the candidate
visual_elements: Candidate shaking hands with the woman
Candidate crouching to child's level for handshake
Camera crew equipment partially visible in background
frames.presentation_style: Warm, staged meeting scenario emphasizing approachability and connection with families; documentary-style coverage of scripted interaction

frames.setting: Same white studio; final frame shows only one active panel (top-left) with candidate leaning over the table, rest of grid is black
visual_elements: Single active frame among black panels indicating video end
Candidate in dark outfit bending over table
Studio equipment (cables, microphone stand) visible at edge of frame
frames.presentation_style: Video trails off with final action frames; no closing graphic or text card in these frames; raw, unbranded ending visible in grid

summary.dominant_setting: Minimalist white photography/video studio with mid-century furniture
visual_themes: No text graphics or branding visible
